events.text: Goal! Scotland 0, Morocco 1. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a through ball.
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Scotland. Ben Gannon-Doak replaces Kieran Tierney because of an injury.
Andy Robertson (Scotland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Scotland. Lyndon Dykes replaces Ché Adams.
Substitution, Scotland. Kenny McLean replaces Ryan Christie.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Morocco. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab replaces Brahim Díaz.
Substitution, Scotland. Anthony Ralston replaces Nathan Patterson.
Substitution, Scotland. Ross Stewart replaces John McGinn.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
